subject: Contract terminated: {player}
body:
The contract of {player} has been terminated.

A compensation fee of €{penalty} has been paid to the player. The player is now a free agent and can be signed by any club.

The wage budget has been adjusted accordingly.

es.subject: Contrato rescindido: {player}
es.body:
El contrato de {player} ha sido rescindido.

Se ha pagado una compensación de €{penalty} al jugador. El jugador es ahora agente libre y puede ser fichado por cualquier club.

El presupuesto salarial ha sido ajustado en consecuencia.
